items.original_title: CodeQL 2.26.0 adds Kotlin 2.4.0 support and AI prompt injection detection
items.title_en: CodeQL 2.26.0 adds AI prompt injection detection
items.summary_en: GitHub's latest CodeQL release adds a JavaScript and TypeScript query for system prompt injection, plus new prompt-injection sinks for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google GenAI SDKs.
items.title_zh: CodeQL 2.26.0 新增 AI 系统提示词注入检测
items.summary_zh: GitHub 为 CodeQL 增加 JavaScript/TypeScript 系统提示词注入查询，并扩展对 OpenAI、Anthropic 与 Google GenAI SDK 的风险检测。AI 应用安全开始进入常规代码扫描体系。

items.original_title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
items.title_en: OpenAI releases the GPT-5.6 model family
items.summary_en: OpenAI made GPT-5.6 generally available in three variants: Sol for maximum capability, Terra as a balanced model, and Luna for cost-efficient workloads across ChatGPT, Codex, and the API.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 正式发布 GPT-5.6 模型家族
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.6 已在 ChatGPT、Codex 与 API 中全面可用，包含旗舰 Sol、均衡型 Terra 和高性价比 Luna 三个版本，重点提升复杂知识工作、编码与工具使用能力。

items.original_title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
items.title_en: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work for long-running tasks
items.summary_en: ChatGPT Work can operate across apps and files, stay with projects for hours, and produce finished artifacts such as documents, spreadsheets, slides, and sites.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Work，面向长时间复杂任务
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 可以跨应用和文件执行任务，持续处理数小时的项目，并直接产出文档、表格、幻灯片和网站等成果，代表通用 AI Agent 向完整工作交付继续推进。

items.original_title: UST is bringing Claude to physical AI
items.title_en: UST brings Claude into physical AI and industrial engineering
items.summary_en: UST is integrating Claude into chip validation and other engineering workflows while training 20,000 employees, illustrating how agents are moving from pilots into regulated physical production systems.
items.title_zh: UST 将 Claude 引入芯片验证与实体工业流程
items.summary_zh: UST 正把 Claude 接入芯片验证、制造、医疗、通信与银行工作流，并计划培训 2 万名员工。这是 AI Agent 从试点进入高要求实体生产系统的重要产业案例。

items.title_en: NVIDIA argues that open data is critical for inspectable AI agents
items.summary_en: NVIDIA's Hugging Face article explains why agent training needs open and synthetic datasets covering tool use, failures, recovery, workflows, safety, and locally grounded personas.
items.title_zh: NVIDIA：可审查的 AI Agent 离不开开放数据
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA 在 Hugging Face 讨论 Agent 数据的重要性：除模型权重外，还需要覆盖工具调用、失败恢复、工作流、安全和本地化角色的开放与合成数据，才能让行为可解释、可复现。

items.title_en: Clodex IDE: a local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE
items.summary_en: An open-source agentic IDE focused on verifiable autonomous software development, keeping execution local and emphasizing zero-trust controls. It reached 696 GitHub stars during this collection.
items.title_zh: Clodex IDE：本地优先、零信任的 Agent 开发环境
items.summary_zh: 该开源 IDE 面向可验证的自治软件开发，强调本地执行和零信任控制。本次采集时项目已获得 696 个 GitHub Star，值得关注其 Agent 开发工作流。

items.title_en: Morphe AI uses a multi-agent pipeline for Android APK patching
items.summary_en: Morphe is an open-source Android APK analysis and patching workspace that coordinates agents for target discovery, patch authoring, and deployment.
items.title_zh: Morphe AI 用多 Agent 流水线处理 Android APK 补丁
items.summary_zh: 该开源工作区让多个 Agent 协同完成 APK 分析、目标定位、补丁编写和部署，展示了多 Agent 在安全研究与软件改造中的垂直应用方式。

items.title_en: DiffusionGemma prompt-building nodes arrive for ComfyUI LTX workflows
items.summary_en: A new ComfyUI extension provides DiffusionGemma Director Assistant nodes for LTX image and video workflows, giving creators another structured prompt-building component.
items.title_zh: ComfyUI 新增面向 LTX 工作流的 DiffusionGemma 提示词节点
items.summary_zh: 这个新扩展为 ComfyUI LTX 图片与视频工作流提供 DiffusionGemma Director Assistant 节点，帮助创作者把提示词构建加入可视化生成流程。

items.title_en: Plandeck turns long-running agent plans into a visual Kanban
items.summary_en: The project visualizes agent dependencies, ready tasks, and critical paths so teams can follow long-running autonomous work without reading a large Markdown plan.
items.title_zh: Plandeck 把长时间运行的 Agent 计划变成可视化看板
items.summary_zh: 项目用看板展示 Agent 的依赖关系、就绪任务和关键路径，让团队无需阅读冗长 Markdown，也能跟踪自治任务的执行进度。

items.title_en: Vox Director automates paper-collage explainer video production
items.summary_en: This open-source agent skill turns one topic into a finished Vox-style explainer or ad video by orchestrating Atlas Cloud and FFmpeg end to end.
items.title_zh: Vox Director 自动完成纸片拼贴风解说视频
items.summary_zh: 这个开源 Agent Skill 从一个主题出发，串联 Atlas Cloud 与 FFmpeg 自动生成 Vox 风格解说或广告视频，体现了生成式视频工作流的端到端自动化。
items.source: GitHub · 生成式 AI 新项目
